verses.latin_vulgate: Post hæc autem verba in regno Artaxerxis regis Persarum, Esdras filius Saraiæ, filii Azariæ, filii Helciæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחַר֙ הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה בְּמַלְכ֖וּת אַרְתַּחְשַׁ֣סְתְּא מֶֽלֶךְ־פָּרָ֑ס עֶזְרָא֙ בֶּן־שְׂרָיָ֔ה בֶּן־עֲזַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now after these things in the reign of Artaxerxes king of the Persians, Esdras the son of Saraias, the son of Azarias, the son of Helcias,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta näiden jälkeen Artahsastan Persian kuninkaan hallitessa oli Esra Serajan poika, Asarian pojan, Hilkian pojan,
verses.king_james: Now after these things, in the reign of Artaxerxes king of Persia, Ezra the son of Seraiah, the son of Azariah, the son of Hilkiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Sellum, filii Sadoc, filii Achitob,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שַׁלּ֥וּם בֶּן־צָד֖וֹק בֶּן־אֲחִיטֽוּב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Sellum, the son of Sadoc, the son of Achitob,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sallumin pojan, Zadokin pojan, Ahitobin pojan,
verses.king_james: The son of Shallum, the son of Zadok, the son of Ahitub,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Amariæ, filii Azariæ, filii Maraioth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֲמַרְיָ֥ה בֶן־עֲזַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־מְרָיֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Amarias, the son of Azarias, the son of Maraioth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Amarian pojan, Asarian pojan, Merajotin pojan,
verses.king_james: The son of Amariah, the son of Azariah, the son of Meraioth,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Zarahiæ, filii Ozi, filii Bocci,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־זְרַֽחְיָ֥ה בֶן־עֻזִּ֖י בֶּן־בֻּקִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Zarahias, the son of Ozi, the son of Bocci,
verses.finnish_biblia: Serahian pojan, Ussin pojan, Bukkin pojan,
verses.king_james: The son of Zerahiah, the son of Uzzi, the son of Bukki,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Abisue, filii Phinees, filii Eleazar, filii Aaron sacerdotis ab initio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֲבִישׁ֗וּעַ בֶּן־פִּֽינְחָס֙ בֶּן־אֶלְעָזָ֔ר בֶּן־אַהֲרֹ֥ן הַכֹּהֵ֖ן הָרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of Abisue, the son of Phinees, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron, the priest from the beginning.
verses.finnish_biblia: Abisuan pojan, Pinehaan pojan, Eleatsarin pojan, ylimmäisen papin Aaronin pojan.
verses.king_james: The son of Abishua, the son of Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the chief priest:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse Esdras ascendit de Babylone, et ipse scriba velox in lege Moysi, quam Dominus Deus dedit Israël : et dedit ei rex secundum manum Domini Dei ejus super eum, omnem petitionem ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֤וּא עֶזְרָא֙ עָלָ֣ה מִבָּבֶ֔ל וְהֽוּא־סֹפֵ֤ר מָהִיר֙ בְּתוֹרַ֣ת מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּתֶּן־ל֣וֹ הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ כְּיַד־יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהָיו֙ עָלָ֔יו כֹּ֖ל בַּקָּשָׁתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This Esdras went up from Babylon, and he was a ready scribe in the law of Moses, which the Lord God had given to Israel: and the king granted him all his request, according to the hand of the Lord his God upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä Esra meni ylös Babelista, joka oli toimellinen kirjanoppinut Moseksen laissa, jonka Herra Israelin Jumala oli antanut. Ja kuningas antoi hänelle kaikki, mitä hän anoi, Herran hänen Jumalansa käden jälkeen, joka hänen ylitsensä oli.
verses.king_james: This Ezra went up from Babylon; and he was a ready scribe in the law of Moses, which the Lord God of Israel had given: and the king granted him all his request, according to the hand of the Lord his God upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ascenderunt de filiis Israël, et de filiis sacerdotum, et de filiis Levitarum, et de cantoribus, et de janitoribus, et de Nathinæis, in Jerusalem, anno septimo Artaxerxis regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעֲל֣וּ מִבְּנֵֽי־יִ֠שְׂרָאֵ֠ל וּמִן־הַכֹּהֲנִ֨ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֜ם וְהַמְשֹׁרְרִ֧ים וְהַשֹּׁעֲרִ֛ים וְהַנְּתִינִ֖ים אֶל־יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם בִּשְׁנַת־שֶׁ֖בַע לְאַרְתַּחְשַׁ֥סְתְּא הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there went up some of the children of Israel, and of the children of the priests, and of the children of the Levites, and of the singing men, and of the porters, and of the Nathinites to Jerusalem in the seventh year of Artaxerxes the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siinä meni muutamia Israelin lapsista ja papeista ja Leviläisistä, veisaajista, ovenvartioista ja Netinimeistä ylös Jerusalemiin, seitsemäntenä Artahsastan kuninkaan vuonna.
verses.king_james: And there went up some of the children of Israel, and of the priests, and the Levites, and the singers, and the porters, and the Nethinims, unto Jerusalem, in the seventh year of Artaxerxes the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et venerunt in Jerusalem mense quinto, ipse est annus septimus regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֥א יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בַּחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַחֲמִישִׁ֑י הִ֛יא שְׁנַ֥ת הַשְּׁבִיעִ֖ית לַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they came to Jerusalem in the fifth month, in the seventh year of the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuli Jerusalemiin viidentenä kuukautena, se oli seitsemäs kuninkaan vuosi.
verses.king_james: And he came to Jerusalem in the fifth month, which was in the seventh year of the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia in primo die mensis primi cœpit ascendere de Babylone, et in primo die mensis quinti venit in Jerusalem, juxta manum Dei sui bonam super se.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֗י בְּאֶחָד֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֔וֹן ה֣וּא יְסֻ֔ד הַֽמַּעֲלָ֖ה מִבָּבֶ֑ל וּבְאֶחָ֞ד לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַחֲמִישִׁ֗י בָּ֚א אֶל־יְר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם כְּיַד־אֱלֹהָ֖יו הַטּוֹבָ֥ה עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: For upon the first day of the first month he began to go up from Babylon, and on the first day of the fifth month he came to Jerusalem according to the good hand of his God upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ensimäisenä päivänä ensimäistä kuuta alkoi hän lähteä Babelista, ja ensimäisenä päivänä viidennettä kuuta tuli hän Jerusalemiin, Jumalan hyvän käden kautta, joka hänen ylitsensä oli.
verses.king_james: For upon the first day of the first month began he to go up from Babylon, and on the first day of the fifth month came he to Jerusalem, according to the good hand of his God upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Esdras enim paravit cor suum, ut investigaret legem Domini, et faceret et doceret in Israël præceptum et judicium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י עֶזְרָא֙ הֵכִ֣ין לְבָב֔וֹ לִדְרֹ֛שׁ אֶת־תּוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלַעֲשֹׂ֑ת וּלְלַמֵּ֥ד בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל חֹ֥ק וּמִשְׁפָּֽט׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For Esdras had prepared his heart to seek the law of the Lord, and to do and to teach in Israel the commandments and judgment.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Esra oli valmistanut sydämensä etsimään Herran lakia, ja tekemään sitä ja opettamaan Israelille säätyjä ja oikeutta.
verses.king_james: For Ezra had prepared his heart to seek the law of the Lord, and to do it, and to teach in Israel statutes and judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc est autem exemplar epistolæ edicti, quod dedit rex Artaxerxes Esdræ sacerdoti, scribæ erudito in sermonibus et præceptis Domini, et cæremoniis ejus in Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֶ֣ה ׀ פַּרְשֶׁ֣גֶן הַֽנִּשְׁתְּוָ֗ן אֲשֶׁ֤ר נָתַן֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אַרְתַּחְשַׁ֔סְתְּא לְעֶזְרָ֥א הַכֹּהֵ֖ן הַסֹּפֵ֑ר סֹפֵ֞ר דִּבְרֵ֧י מִצְוֺת־יְהֹוָ֛ה וְחֻקָּ֖יו עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And this is the copy of the letter of the edict, which king Artaxerxes gave to Esdras the priest, the scribe instructed in the words and commandments of the Lord, and his ceremonies in Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja näin on se kirja, jonka Artahsasta antoi papille Esralle, kirjanoppineelle, joka oli opettaja Herran käskysanoissa ja säädyissä Israelille:
verses.king_james: Now this is the copy of the letter that the king Artaxerxes gave unto Ezra the priest, the scribe, even a scribe of the words of the commandments of the Lord, and of his statutes to Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Artaxerxes rex regum Esdræ sacerdoti scribæ legis Dei cæli doctissimo, salutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֨רְתַּחְשַׁ֔סְתְּא מֶ֖לֶךְ מַלְכַיָּ֑א לְעֶזְרָ֣א כָ֠הֲנָ֠א סָפַ֨ר דָּתָ֜א דִּֽי־אֱלָ֧הּ שְׁמַיָּ֛א גְּמִ֖יר וּכְעֶֽנֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Artaxerxes king of kings to Esdras the priest, the most learned scribe of the law of the God of heaven, greeting.
verses.finnish_biblia: Artahsasta kuningasten kuningas Esralle papille ja kirjanoppineelle taivaan Jumalan laissa: rauhaa tällä ajalla!
verses.king_james: Artaxerxes, king of kings, unto Ezra the priest, a scribe of the law of the God of heaven, perfect peace, and at such a time.

verses.latin_vulgate: A me decretum est, ut cuicumque placuerit in regno meo de populo Israël, et de sacerdotibus ejus, et de Levitis, ire in Jerusalem, tecum vadat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִנִּי֮ שִׂ֣ים טְעֵם֒ דִּ֣י כׇל־מִתְנַדַּ֣ב בְּמַלְכוּתִי֩ מִן־עַמָּ֨א יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל וְכָהֲנ֣וֹהִי וְלֵוָיֵ֗א לִמְהָ֧ךְ לִֽירוּשְׁלֶ֛ם עִמָּ֖ךְ יְהָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: It is decreed by me, that all they of the people of Israel, and of the priests and of the Levites in my realm, that are minded to go into Jerusalem, should go with thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen käskenyt, että kenenkä ikänä kelpaa minun valtakunnassani Israelin kansasta, papeista ja Leviläisistä mennä kanssas Jerusalemiin, niin menkään.
verses.king_james: I make a decree, that all they of the people of Israel, and of his priests and Levites, in my realm, which are minded of their own freewill to go up to Jerusalem, go with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: A facie enim regis, et septem consiliatorum ejus, missus es, ut visites Judæam et Jerusalem in lege Dei tui, quæ est in manu tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־קֳבֵ֗ל דִּי֩ מִן־קֳדָ֨ם מַלְכָּ֜א וְשִׁבְעַ֤ת יָעֲטֹ֙הִי֙ שְׁלִ֔יחַ לְבַקָּרָ֥ה עַל־יְה֖וּד וְלִֽירוּשְׁלֶ֑ם בְּדָ֥ת אֱלָהָ֖ךְ דִּ֥י בִידָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou art sent from before the king, and his seven counsellors, to visit Judea and Jerusalem according to the law of thy God, which is in thy hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet lähetetty kuninkaalta ja seitsemältä neuvonantajalta etsimään Juudaa ja Jerusalemia, sinun Jumalas lain jälkeen, joka käsissäs on;
verses.king_james: Forasmuch as thou art sent of the king, and of his seven counsellors, to enquire concerning Judah and Jerusalem, according to the law of thy God which is in thine hand;

verses.latin_vulgate: et ut feras argentum et aurum quod rex, et consiliatores ejus, sponte obtulerunt Deo Israël, cujus in Jerusalem tabernaculum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְהֵיבָלָ֖ה כְּסַ֣ף וּדְהַ֑ב דִּֽי־מַלְכָּ֣א וְיָעֲט֗וֹהִי הִתְנַדַּ֙בוּ֙ לֶאֱלָ֣הּ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל דִּ֥י בִֽירוּשְׁלֶ֖ם מִשְׁכְּנֵֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to carry the silver and gold, which the king and his counsellors have freely offered to the God of Israel, whose tabernacle is in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ettäs otat myötäs sen hopian ja kullan, minkä kuningas ja hänen neuvonantajansa hyvällä mielellä ovat uhranneet Israelin Jumalalle, jonka maja on Jerusalemissa.
verses.king_james: And to carry the silver and gold, which the king and his counsellors have freely offered unto the God of Israel, whose habitation is in Jerusalem,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omne argentum et aurum quodcumque inveneris in universa provincia Babylonis, et populus offerre voluerit, et de sacerdotibus quæ sponte obtulerint domui Dei sui, quæ est in Jerusalem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹל֙ כְּסַ֣ף וּדְהַ֔ב דִּ֣י תְהַשְׁכַּ֔ח בְּכֹ֖ל מְדִינַ֣ת בָּבֶ֑ל עִם֩ הִתְנַדָּב֨וּת עַמָּ֤א וְכָֽהֲנַיָּא֙ מִֽתְנַדְּבִ֔ין לְבֵ֥ית אֱלָהֲהֹ֖ם דִּ֥י בִירוּשְׁלֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the silver and gold that thou shalt find in all the province of Babylon, and that the people is willing to offer, and that the priests shall offer of their own accord to the house of their God, which is in Jerusalem,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikkinaisen hopian ja kullan, minkä sinä saat koko Babelin maakunnasta, kuin kansa ja papit hyvällä mielellä antavat Jumalan huoneesen, joka on Jerusalemissa.
verses.king_james: And all the silver and gold that thou canst find in all the province of Babylon, with the freewill offering of the people, and of the priests, offering willingly for the house of their God which is in Jerusalem:

verses.latin_vulgate: libere accipe, et studiose eme de hac pecunia vitulos, arietes, agnos, et sacrificia, et libamina eorum, et offer ea super altare templi Dei vestri, quod est in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־קֳבֵ֣ל דְּנָה֩ אׇסְפַּ֨רְנָא תִקְנֵ֜א בְּכַסְפָּ֣א דְנָ֗ה תּוֹרִ֤ין ׀ דִּכְרִין֙ אִמְּרִ֔ין וּמִנְחָתְה֖וֹן וְנִסְכֵּיה֑וֹן וּתְקָרֵ֣ב הִמּ֔וֹ עַֽל־מַדְבְּחָ֔ה דִּ֛י בֵּ֥ית אֱלָהֲכֹ֖ם דִּ֥י בִירוּשְׁלֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take freely, and buy diligently with this money, calves, rams, lambs, with the sacrifices and libations of them, and offer them upon the altar of the temple of your God, that is in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden osta nopiasti sillä rahalla mullia, oinaita ja karitsoita, ja ruokauhria ja juomauhria, ja uhraa ne teidän Jumalanne huoneen alttarilla, joka on Jerusalemissa.
verses.king_james: That thou mayest buy speedily with this money bullocks, rams, lambs, with their meat offerings and their drink offerings, and offer them upon the altar of the house of your God which is in Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et si quid tibi et fratribus tuis placuerit de reliquo argento et auro ut faciatis, juxta voluntatem Dei vestri facite.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָ֣ה דִי֩ (עליך) [עֲלָ֨ךְ] וְעַל־[אֶחָ֜ךְ] (אחיך) יֵיטַ֗ב בִּשְׁאָ֛ר כַּסְפָּ֥א וְדַהֲבָ֖ה לְמֶעְבַּ֑ד כִּרְע֥וּת אֱלָהֲכֹ֖ם תַּעַבְדֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if it seem good to thee, and to thy brethren to do any thing with the rest of the silver and gold, do it according to the will of your God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta mitä sinun ja sinun veljes siitä rahasta kelpaa tehdä, joka liiaksi on, se tehkäät teidän Jumalanne tahdon jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And whatsoever shall seem good to thee, and to thy brethren, to do with the rest of the silver and the gold, that do after the will of your God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vasa quoque, quæ dantur tibi in ministerium domus Dei tui, trade in conspectu Dei in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָֽאנַיָּא֙ דִּֽי־מִתְיַהֲבִ֣ין לָ֔ךְ לְפׇלְחָ֖ן בֵּ֣ית אֱלָהָ֑ךְ הַשְׁלֵ֕ם קֳדָ֖ם אֱלָ֥הּ יְרוּשְׁלֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The vessels also, that are given thee for the sacrifice of the house of thy God, deliver thou in the sight of God in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja astiat, jotka sinun haltuus ovat annetut sinun Jumalas huoneen palvelukseksi, anna ne pois Jumalan eteen Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: The vessels also that are given thee for the service of the house of thy God, those deliver thou before the God of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et cetera, quibus opus fuerit in domum Dei tui, quantumcumque necesse est ut expendas, dabitur de thesauro, et de fisco regis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁאָ֗ר חַשְׁחוּת֙ בֵּ֣ית אֱלָהָ֔ךְ דִּ֥י יִפֶּל־לָ֖ךְ לְמִנְתַּ֑ן תִּנְתֵּ֕ן מִן־בֵּ֖ית גִּנְזֵ֥י מַלְכָּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And whatsoever more there shall be need of for the house of thy God, how much soever thou shalt have occasion to spend, it shall be given out of the treasury, and the king's exchequer, and by me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja mitä enempää tarvitaan sinun Jumalas huoneesen ja sinä kulutat, niin anna se kuninkaan tavarahuoneesta.
verses.king_james: And whatsoever more shall be needful for the house of thy God, which thou shalt have occasion to bestow, bestow it out of the king’s treasure house.

verses.latin_vulgate: et a me. Ego Artaxerxes rex, statui atque decrevi omnibus custodibus arcæ publicæ, qui sunt trans flumen, ut quodcumque petierit a vobis Esdras sacerdos, scriba legis Dei cæli, absque mora detis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֠מִנִּ֠י אֲנָ֞ה אַרְתַּחְשַׁ֤סְתְּא מַלְכָּא֙ שִׂ֣ים טְעֵ֔ם לְכֹל֙ גִּזַּֽבְרַיָּ֔א דִּ֖י בַּעֲבַ֣ר נַהֲרָ֑ה דִּ֣י כׇל־דִּ֣י יִ֠שְׁאֲלֶנְכ֠וֹן עֶזְרָ֨א כָהֲנָ֜א סָפַ֤ר דָּתָא֙ דִּֽי־אֱלָ֣הּ שְׁמַיָּ֔א אׇסְפַּ֖רְנָא יִתְעֲבִֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: I Artaxerxes the king have ordered and decreed to all the keepers of the public chest, that are beyond the river, that whatsoever Esdras the priest, the scribe of the law of the God of heaven, shall require of you, you give it without delay,
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kuningas Artahsasta olen käskenyt veronhaltioille sillä puolella virtaa, että mitä ikänä Esra pappi ja kirjanoppinut taivaan Jumalan laissa teiltä anoo, se tehkäät nopiasti,
verses.king_james: And I, even I Artaxerxes the king, do make a decree to all the treasurers which are beyond the river, that whatsoever Ezra the priest, the scribe of the law of the God of heaven, shall require of you, it be done speedily,

verses.latin_vulgate: usque ad argenti talenta centum, et usque ad frumenti coros centum, et usque ad vini batos centum, et usque ad batos olei centum, sal vero absque mensura.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־כְּסַף֮ כַּכְּרִ֣ין מְאָה֒ וְעַד־חִנְטִין֙ כּוֹרִ֣ין מְאָ֔ה וְעַד־חֲמַר֙ בַּתִּ֣ין מְאָ֔ה וְעַד־בַּתִּ֥ין מְשַׁ֖ח מְאָ֑ה וּמְלַ֖ח דִּי־לָ֥א כְתָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Unto a hundred talents of silver, and unto a hundred cores of wheat, and unto a hundred bates of wine, and unto a hundred bates of oil, and salt without measure.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hamaan sataan leiviskään hopiaa, ja sataan koriin nisuja, ja sataan tynnyriin viinaa, ja sataan tynnyriin öljyä, ja suoloja ilman mittaa.
verses.king_james: Unto an hundred talents of silver, and to an hundred measures of wheat, and to an hundred baths of wine, and to an hundred baths of oil, and salt without prescribing how much.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omne quod ad ritum Dei cæli pertinet, tribuatur diligenter in domo Dei cæli : ne forte irascatur contra regnum regis, et filiorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־דִּ֗י מִן־טַ֙עַם֙ אֱלָ֣הּ שְׁמַיָּ֔א יִתְעֲבֵד֙ אַדְרַזְדָּ֔א לְבֵ֖ית אֱלָ֣הּ שְׁמַיָּ֑א דִּֽי־לְמָ֤ה לֶֽהֱוֵא֙ קְצַ֔ף עַל־מַלְכ֥וּת מַלְכָּ֖א וּבְנֽוֹהִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: All that belongeth to the rites of the God of heaven, let it be given diligently in the house of the God of heaven: lest his wrath should be enkindled against the realm of the king, and of his sons.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikkia mitä taivaan Jumalan laki anoo, se pitää taivaan Jumalan huoneelle juuri nopiasti tehtämän, ettei hänen vihansa tulisi kuninkaan valtakunnan ja hänen lastensa päälle.
verses.king_james: Whatsoever is commanded by the God of heaven, let it be diligently done for the house of the God of heaven: for why should there be wrath against the realm of the king and his sons?

verses.latin_vulgate: Vobis quoque notum facimus de universis sacerdotibus, et Levitis, et cantoribus, et janitoribus, Nathinæis, et ministris domus Dei hujus, ut vectigal, et tributum, et annonas non habeatis potestatem imponendi super eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְכֹ֣ם מְהוֹדְעִ֗ין דִּ֣י כׇל־כָּהֲנַיָּ֣א וְ֠לֵוָיֵ֠א זַמָּ֨רַיָּ֤א תָרָֽעַיָּא֙ נְתִ֣ינַיָּ֔א וּפָ֣לְחֵ֔י בֵּ֖ית אֱלָהָ֣א דְנָ֑ה מִנְדָּ֤ה בְלוֹ֙ וַהֲלָ֔ךְ לָ֥א שַׁלִּ֖יט לְמִרְמֵ֥א עֲלֵיהֹֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: We give you also to understand concerning all the priests, and the Levites, and the singers, and the porters, and the Nathinites, and ministers of the house of this God, that you have no authority to impose toll or tribute, or custom upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se pitää oleman teille kaikille tiettävä, ettei teillä ole valtaa panna jotakin veroa, tullia eli ajastaikaista ulostekoa yhdenkään papin päälle, Leviläisen, veisaajan, ovenvartijan, Netinimin, tämän Jumalan huoneen palveliain päälle,
verses.king_james: Also we certify you, that touching any of the priests and Levites, singers, porters, Nethinims, or ministers of this house of God, it shall not be lawful to impose toll, tribute, or custom, upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem Esdra, secundum sapientiam Dei tui, quæ est in manu tua, constitue judices et præsides, ut judicent omni populo qui est trans flumen, his videlicet qui noverunt legem Dei tui : sed et imperitos docete libere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַ֣נְתְּ עֶזְרָ֗א כְּחׇכְמַ֨ת אֱלָהָ֤ךְ דִּֽי־בִידָךְ֙ מֶ֣נִּי שָׁפְטִ֞ין וְדַיָּנִ֗ין דִּי־לֶהֱוֺ֤ן (דאנין) [דָּאיְנִין֙] לְכׇל־עַמָּא֙ דִּ֚י בַּעֲבַ֣ר נַהֲרָ֔ה לְכׇל־יָדְעֵ֖י דָּתֵ֣י אֱלָהָ֑ךְ וְדִ֧י לָ֦א יָדַ֖ע תְּהוֹדְעֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou Esdras according to the wisdom of thy God, which is in thy hand, appoint judges and magistrates, that may judge all the people, that is beyond the river, that is, for them who know the law of thy God, yea and the ignorant teach ye freely.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun, Esra, pitää Jumalas viisauden jälkeen, joka sinulla on, paneman tuomarit ja oikeuden tekiät, tuomitsemaan kaiken kansan, joka toisella puolella virtaa on, että kaikki taitaisivat sinun Jumalas lain; ja sitä, joka ei taida, pitää teidän opettaman.
verses.king_james: And thou, Ezra, after the wisdom of thy God, that is in thine hand, set magistrates and judges, which may judge all the people that are beyond the river, all such as know the laws of thy God; and teach ye them that know them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnis qui non fecerit legem Dei tui, et legem regis, diligenter, judicium erit de eo sive in mortem, sive in exilium, sive in condemnationem substantiæ ejus, vel certe in carcerem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־דִּי־לָא֩ לֶהֱוֵ֨א עָבֵ֜ד דָּתָ֣א דִֽי־אֱלָהָ֗ךְ וְדָתָא֙ דִּ֣י מַלְכָּ֔א אׇסְפַּ֕רְנָא דִּינָ֕ה לֶהֱוֵ֥א מִתְעֲבֵ֖ד מִנֵּ֑הּ הֵ֤ן לְמוֹת֙ הֵ֣ן (לשרשו) [לִשְׁרֹשִׁ֔י] הֵן־לַעֲנָ֥שׁ נִכְסִ֖ין וְלֶאֱסוּרִֽין׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And whosoever will not do the law of thy God, and the law of the king diligently, judgment shall be executed upon him, either unto death, or unto banishment, or to the confiscation of goods, or at least to prison.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jokainen, joka ei tee visusti sinun Jumalas lakia ja kuninkaan lakia, hänen pitää saaman tuomionsa työnsä jälkeen, joko se on kuolemaan, eli maan kulkemukseen, eli rahasakkoon, taikka vankeuteen.
verses.king_james: And whosoever will not do the law of thy God, and the law of the king, let judgment be executed speedily upon him, whether it be unto death, or to banishment, or to confiscation of goods, or to imprisonment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus patrum nostrorum, qui dedit hoc in corde regis ut glorificaret domum Domini quæ est in Jerusalem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י אֲבֹתֵ֑ינוּ אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָתַ֤ן כָּזֹאת֙ בְּלֵ֣ב הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ לְפָאֵ֕ר אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord the God of our fathers, who hath put this in the king's heart, to glorify the house of the Lord, which is in Jerusalem,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra, meidän isäimme Jumala, joka tainkaltaisen asian on antanut kuninkaan sydämeen, että hän kaunistaa Herran huonetta Jerusalemissa!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord God of our fathers, which hath put such a thing as this in the king’s heart, to beautify the house of the Lord which is in Jerusalem:

verses.latin_vulgate: et in me inclinavit misericordiam suam coram rege et consiliatoribus ejus, et universis principibus regis potentibus : et ego confortatus manu Domini Dei mei, quæ erat in me, congregavi de Israël principes qui ascenderent mecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָלַ֣י הִטָּה־חֶ֗סֶד לִפְנֵ֤י הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וְיֽוֹעֲצָ֔יו וּלְכׇל־שָׂרֵ֥י הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ הַגִּבֹּרִ֑ים וַאֲנִ֣י הִתְחַזַּ֗קְתִּי כְּיַד־יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהַי֙ עָלַ֔י וָאֶקְבְּצָ֧ה מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֛ל רָאשִׁ֖ים לַעֲל֥וֹת עִמִּֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And hath inclined his mercy toward me before the king and his counsellors, and all the mighty princes of the king: and I being strengthened by the hand of the Lord my God, which was upon me, gathered together out of Israel chief men to go up with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän on kääntänyt laupiuden minun päälleni kuninkaan ja hänen neuvonantajainsa ja kaikkein kuninkaan voimallisten päämiesten edessä. Ja minä vahvistettiin Herran minun Jumalani kädellä, joka oli minun ylitseni, ja kokosin päämiehet Israelista menemään ylös minun kanssani.
verses.king_james: And hath extended mercy unto me before the king, and his counsellors, and before all the king’s mighty princes. And I was strengthened as the hand of the Lord my God was upon me, and I gathered together out of Israel chief men to go up with me.
